daily_summary.headline: Artemis II Prepares for Historic Lunar Flyby

top_events.title: SLS Block 1 | Artemis II
top_events.description: Artemis II is the first crewed mission as part of the Artemis program. It will send a crew of 4 around the moon and return them back to Earth.
top_events.action: Watch the historic launch live on NASA's official channels.

top_events.title: Aurora Viewing Opportunity
top_events.description: A G2 geomagnetic storm is expected, offering a good chance to view auroras at latitudes down to 60°.
top_events.action: Check local weather and head to a dark location for the best viewing.

top_events.title: Tianlong-3 Demo Flight
top_events.description: First test launch of Space Pioneer’s Tianlong-3 rocket, potentially carrying a batch of satellites.
top_events.action: Follow updates from Space Pioneer for live coverage.

alerts.title: Artemis II Launch Alert
alerts.message: Artemis II, the first crewed mission of the Artemis program, is set to launch. This mission will send a crew of 4 around the moon and back to Earth.
alerts.action_required: Watch the launch live on NASA's official channels.

opportunities.recommendation: Good viewing opportunity for high-latitude observers. Worth checking if you're above 60° latitude and skies are clear.
Good viewing opportunity for high-latitude observers. Worth checking if you're above 60° latitude and skies are clear.
